name: balaur-memory
description: A consent-gated, lineage-tracked, forgettable memory layer for personal AI. One SQLite file, no services, no models. Bun-only by design.

scripts.check: bunx tsc --noEmit && bunx biome check . && bun test
scripts.build:cross: bun build ./cli/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/balaur-darwin-arm64 && bun build ./cli/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/balaur-darwin-x64 && bun build ./cli/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile dist/balaur-linux-arm64 && bun build ./cli/index.ts --compile --minify --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/balaur-linux-x64
